page_title: Evangelion New Theatrical Edition: SCENE OF EVANGELION ~Unit-01 Awakening Edition~
text:
is a line of candy toys produced by Shokugan that was released in late January 2012. https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/products/2012/731586.html The line was based on the Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance film. There are 4 regular and 2 secret figures in the line.
